title: The Real Don Returns 2
subTitle: The Real Don Returns 2

title: Shoorveer 2
subTitle: Jeeva and Joshna set out to find a solution after learning that they are leading parallel lives with a couple living next door.

title: Mahaveer No.1
subTitle: A young orphan, White, challenges the sly Adikesavalu for control of the Ongole market and his daughter. Their fight unearths a past of greed, injustice and a simmering quest for revenge.

title: Krishna Ki Love Story
subTitle: Krishna Ki Love Story

title: Vijay The Master
subTitle: Troubled alcoholic teacher JD goes to work at a juvenile reform school. When he realises a dangerous criminal is using students to cover up his crimes, JD sets out to stop him.

title: Vettaiyan
subTitle: The rape and murder of a teacher leads Athiyan, a policeman known for encounter killing, to unknowingly murder an innocent man. Soon, a guilty Athiyan sets out to reinvestigate her case.

title: Raid 2
subTitle: An honest Income Tax officer, Amay Patnaik, confronts the corrupt nexus in Bhoj. Beneath the veneer of honesty lies a sinister operation tied to Dada Bhai, a revered politician.

title: Jawan
subTitle: Driven by a personal vendetta, a man sets out to rectify the wrongs in the society to keep a promise made years ago.

title: Skanda: The Attacker
subTitle: After Rayudu and Ranjith Reddy's children elope, the CMs turn against each other. However, when a college student kidnaps Reddy's daughter, a revenge saga unravels.

title: Sky Force
subTitle: During the 1965 Indo-Pak conflict, India endures a catastrophic unexpected assault. Wing Commander Ahuja directs a counterattack, but Squadron Leader Vijaya disappears following a brave solo confrontation with a more powerful enemy aircraft. Ahuja dedicates 23 years to uncovering the truth, revealing a conspiracy, and finally achieving posthumous honor for Vijaya's courage and selflessness.

title: Sky Force
subTitle: During the 1965 Indo-Pak conflict, India endures a catastrophic unexpected assault. Wing Commander Ahuja directs a counterattack, but Squadron Leader Vijaya disappears following a brave solo confrontation with a more powerful enemy aircraft. Ahuja dedicates 23 years to uncovering the truth, revealing a conspiracy, and finally achieving posthumous honor for Vijaya's courage and selflessness.

title: Code Name: Tiranga
subTitle: An undercover agent is on a mission to avenge the terrorist attacks committed on Indian soil in 2001. Eventually, the mission leads her to a point of no return.

title: Rowdy Rakshak
subTitle: Kathiravan is assigned to protect Prime Minister Chandrakanth Varma from terrorists. However, he is unsuccessful and takes it upon himself to find the killers.

title: Rowdy Rakshak
subTitle: Kathiravan is assigned to protect Prime Minister Chandrakanth Varma from terrorists. However, he is unsuccessful and takes it upon himself to find the killers.

title: No Entry
subTitle: A gorgeous club dancer's ill-timed rendezvous opens up a Pandora's box of lies, absurdities and misunderstandings in the lives of three quirky couples.

title: Jaanwar
subTitle: A criminal changes the course of his life when he decides to raise a baby who has survived a train crash, but chaos ensues when his past begins to haunt him.

title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
subTitle: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.

title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
subTitle: Bhaijaan, the eldest of three siblings, refuses to get married to maintain harmony in his family. However, complications arise after his brothers conspire for him to fall in love.

title: RRR
subTitle: A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Dhadak
subTitle: A world of uncertainties awaits Madhu and Parthavi as their love transcends class divides and blossoms despite the fierce disapproval of their families.

title: Valimai
subTitle: Arjun, a police officer, sets out on a mission to hunt down a group of violent bikers after they are involved in a theft and murder. When a city's crime rate rises, it is up to Arjun, a police officer, to restore order.

title: Cirkus
subTitle: Two sets of identical twins are separated at birth and grow in two different cities. Years later, chaos ensues when one set of twins decides to visit the town where the other runs a circus.

title: Radhe: Your Most Wanted Bhai
subTitle: Radhe, a daredevil encounter specialist of the Mumbai Police force, vows to knock down the crime syndicate led by an evil drug lord.

title: Raksha Bandhan
subTitle: Embracing his role as the provider, Lala Kedarnath puts personal romantic interests on the back burner until his quirky sisters can be married off into loving families.

title: Hum Aapke Hain Kaun
subTitle: A man and a woman fall in love, but fate intervenes when she has to marry his older brother for the good of their families.

title: Jawan
subTitle: Driven by a personal vendetta, a man sets out to rectify the wrongs in the society to keep a promise made years ago.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Bholaa
subTitle: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.
